text:
<svg {...normalizedProps} data-icon={name}>
  {title && <title>{title}</title>}
  {desc && <desc>{desc}</desc>}
  {
    inline ? (
      <Fragment id={id} set:html={normalizedBody} />
    ) : (
      <Fragment>
        {includeSymbol && <symbol id={id} viewBox={viewBox} set:html={normalizedBody} />}
        <use href={`#${id}`} />
      </Fragment>
    )
  }
</svg>
{legend}
{labels.label}

{ hasSidebar && (
) }
